title: FWStyle Contemporary 6 Drawer Chest of Drawers Black High Gloss with Matt Black Frame, Large Bedroom Storage Furniture with Deep Drawers and Metal Handles W70 x H100 x D40cm
features: Modern & Sophisticated Design – Featuring high gloss black drawer fronts paired with a matt frame finish, the Chilton Six-Drawer Chest adds a touch of contemporary elegance to your home décor. Perfect for modern bedrooms, living rooms, or hallways.

Smooth, Effortless Drawer Operation – With easy-glide metal runners, this chest ensures smooth opening and closing of drawers, providing a luxurious and convenient storage experience. Polished metal curved handles complete the sleek, modern design.

Durable & Scratch-Resistant Finish – The scratch-resistant melamine coating on this chest is designed to withstand everyday wear and tear, ensuring it remains easy to clean and maintain while keeping its sleek look for years.

Ample Storage Space – Offering large, deep drawers, this chest is ideal for organizing bedroom essentials, towels, bedding, and more. Maximize your storage capacity while maintaining a clean and clutter-free space.

Compact Yet Spacious – Perfect for smaller spaces, this six-drawer chest delivers both practicality and style, making it an excellent choice for rooms that need extra storage without taking up too much space.
Dimensions: – Width: 70 cm – Height: 100 cm – Depth: 40 cm – Drawer Depth: 10 cm
description: Furnished with Style Chilton Modern 6 Drawer Chest of Drawer The Chilton six drawer chest is coated with an easy-clean and scratch-resistant melamine coating designed to fend off any un-warranted stains and scratches. In addition the easy-glide metal runners and polished metal curved handles add to the super modern design of this stunning Chest of Black Gloss Drawers. The Drawer fronts are high gloss black and the main carcass is finished in a matt black. Four full-width drawers with two half-width drawers at the top.
